description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Build that runs on push and pull request events to branches master and dev, specifically for paths src/**, .gitmodules, and .github/workflows/main.yml. The workflow should have two jobs, build-client and build-server, both running on windows-latest. build-client checks out the repository with submodules, sets up MSBuild and .NET Core 3.1.402, installs dependencies, and builds Impostor.Client. build-server checks out the repository with submodules, sets up .NET Core 5.0.100-rc.1.20452.10, installs dependencies, builds Impostor.Server, and runs tests.
